title: Embedding a Shareable Chart
excerpt:
I need some help with the ability to embed the iframe of a chart. I’m embedding my chart to display within our LMS. It was working and now the chart data is all 1’s instead of showing what I see in my Monday.com chart.

posts.author: kstatz (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need some help with the ability to embed the iframe of a chart. I’m embedding my chart to display within our LMS. It was working and now the chart data is all 1’s instead of showing what I see in my Monday.com chart.

What it looks like embedded.

Screen Shot 2022-08-09 at 3.51.19 PM1648×1158 63.1 KB

What it looks like in Monday.

Screen Shot 2022-08-09 at 3.53.35 PM1648×1158 9.43 KB

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kstatz

Thanks so much for your post!

This does seems strange, so we would love to have our support team take a closer look into this.
Would you be able to reach out to them via email? You can contact them 24/7 via support@monday.com

They’ll be able to continue to troubleshoot this with you and escalate this to our developers if need be.

Apologies for the extra work here!

Best,

Dani
